asset_scope.scope_note: canonical_registry.environments[] is empty per concept-freeze. All 18 background + 2 prop assets are registered under canonical_registry.other[]. Seasonal layer: 18 backgrounds × 4 seasons × 3 time-of-day = 216 variant specs (palette/lighting deltas, not full redraws).

step_1_view_mode.primary_view_mode_rationale: Match-3 puzzle board occupies center screen; fixed camera; no locomotion. DragonBones character busts staged left/right of board (visual_novel mode for dialogue).

step_2a_background_generation.note: All 18 background specs written and validated. Image generation spec_ready; actual generation pending human approval gate. Manifest updated with seasonal_variants field linking to seasonal spec.

global_spec.ui_negative_space: Center 60% of screen horizontally kept free from busy foreground elements

step_2b_prop_generation.note: 2 props fully specified: prop_notebook (2 variants: closed/open) and prop_lighthouse_lamp (8-frame animation). Specs ready; generation pending approval.

chapter_environment_registry.scene_name: 海边码头（海边の波止場）
chapter_environment_registry.unique_visual_signature: 木制码头栈桥、停泊渔船、海鸥、灯塔轮廓（远景）、低潮礁石

parallax_layers.sky_far: 低云淡青蓝天、远海地平线、隐约灯塔剪影
parallax_layers.midground: 码头木栈桥、停泊小渔船、木制储物箱
parallax_layers.foreground_elements: 绳索、浮标、礁石、海草、前景木桩

chapter_environment_registry.narrative_emotion: 陌生感·第一次真正呼吸
chapter_environment_registry.seasonal_vfx: 粉色樱花粒子飘落，触水即产生细小涟漪

chapter_environment_registry.unique_visual_signature: 石板小路、木质店铺招牌、竹林屏障、晾晒的布帘、花盆与路灯

parallax_layers.sky_far: 暖白晴空、轻云、远处山脉青绿剪影
parallax_layers.midground: 木质两层店铺（杂货铺/茶馆）、竹林、石板广场
parallax_layers.foreground_elements: 木桶花盆、布帘、石灯笼、木牌

chapter_environment_registry.narrative_emotion: 归属感初现·某件一直搁着的事突然不需要搁了
chapter_environment_registry.seasonal_vfx: 萤火虫粒子夜晚漂浮；午后热浪shimmer效果
chapter_environment_registry.lighthouse_visibility_night: distant_glow — faint pulse visible over mountain silhouette

chapter_environment_registry.unique_visual_signature: 粉色花田（樱花/波斯菊）、木制观景台、山坡起伏、蝴蝶剪影、花茎摇摆感

parallax_layers.sky_far: 柔粉蓝天、飘落花瓣远景、朦胧山峦
parallax_layers.midground: 花田山坡、木制小观景台、散落树木
parallax_layers.foreground_elements: 近景花丛（樱花/波斯菊）、草叶、蝴蝶点缀

chapter_environment_registry.narrative_emotion: 情绪松动·五年来第一次闻到有气味的下午
chapter_environment_registry.seasonal_vfx: 枫叶/银杏粒子飘落；午后低角度光线长阴影效果；整体色调偏移至暖橙
chapter_environment_registry.lighthouse_visibility_night: mid_glow — visible from hilltop observation deck, rotating beam arc crosses scene

chapter_environment_registry.scene_name: 森林露营地（森のキャンプ場）
chapter_environment_registry.area: 森林露营地 · 山顶温泉区
chapter_environment_registry.unique_visual_signature: 营地帐篷、篝火台、大树根、苔藓石块、吊床、营地绳灯；冬季：屋顶积雪、温泉蒸汽×2、雪花粒子

parallax_layers.sky_far: 林冠缝隙蓝天或冬日雪天、远景针叶林剪影
parallax_layers.midground: 大树干、帐篷群、营地木台；冬季：温泉小屋（积雪屋顶）
parallax_layers.foreground_elements: 苔藓岩石、蕨草、近景树根；冬季：雪花粒子、蒸汽前景

chapter_environment_registry.narrative_emotion: 安静·独处·第一次不赶时间
chapter_environment_registry.seasonal_vfx: 雪花粒子（轻盈治愈感）；温泉蒸汽粒子体积×2；屋顶积雪贴图；雪花触水融化涟漪；冬夜灯台光柱穿雪雾体积光晕
chapter_environment_registry.winter_priority: HIGHEST — 全游戏最治愈视觉时刻之一，见winter-hotspring-spec.json
chapter_environment_registry.lighthouse_visibility_night: strong_beam — lighthouse column visible through tree gaps, volumetric halo through snow fog in winter night variant

chapter_environment_registry.unique_visual_signature: 露天温泉池（热气袅绕）、竹篱笆、山谷岩石、红叶/雪景、木制浴舍；神社石灯笼在春雾中暖光晕散

parallax_layers.sky_far: 暖橙黄夕阳或春雾天空、远山雪顶
parallax_layers.midground: 温泉池、竹篱笆围栏、浴舍木屋、神社鸟居
parallax_layers.foreground_elements: 热气蒸腾VFX、岩石苔藓、白梅/粉梅花瓣、竹节前景

chapter_environment_registry.narrative_emotion: 放松·和解·第一次钓到鱼
chapter_environment_registry.seasonal_vfx: 白梅/粉梅花瓣粒子（飘落节奏慢而沉）；温泉池面花瓣漂浮；神社石灯笼在春雾中暖光晕散
chapter_environment_registry.lighthouse_visibility_night: prominent_sweep — beam visible sweeping valley sky, increasing prominence from Ch4

chapter_environment_registry.unique_visual_signature: 海边悬崖灯塔（全景）、星空、月光海面、灯塔金色光束旋转、夜间礁岸、萤火虫聚集灯塔旁

parallax_layers.sky_far: 深蓝夜空、星点、月亮、远海反光
parallax_layers.midground: 灯塔主体（白底红横纹）、悬崖岩壁、海湾
parallax_layers.foreground_elements: 礁石、夜间海草、浪花、灯塔光束前景投影、萤火虫粒子

chapter_environment_registry.narrative_emotion: 孤独中的温暖·一切安静下来之后光出现了
chapter_environment_registry.seasonal_vfx: 萤火虫粒子密度高于Ch2，在灯台光柱旁聚集漂浮；灯台光柱全亮扫海面金色水线动态延伸；海风水雾粒子
chapter_environment_registry.lighting_special: 灯塔金色光束(#F5C842)为场景主光源，上右方月光为辅助光
chapter_environment_registry.lighthouse_visibility_night: FULL_BEAM — lighthouse is primary light source; golden beam sweeps sea, fireflies cluster around beam, gold water line on sea surface

prop_registry.name: ひなた手账
prop_registry.role: narrative_story_prop — NPC对话场景和章节解锁叙事

lighthouse_night_rule.rule: Lighthouse beam visible in ALL night scenes across all 6 chapters

chapter_progression.night_visibility: mid_glow — rotating beam arc crosses scene
strong_beam — visible through tree gaps + volumetric halo in winter snow
FULL_BEAM — primary light source, golden sweep, fireflies

lighthouse_night_rule.enforcement: All night variants in seasonal spec must include lighthouse_visible=true and brightness_delta >= 15% from day baseline

validation_summary.light_direction_unified: PASS — all chapters use upper-right soft diffuse; Ch6 night: moonlight+lighthouse same direction
validation_summary.six_chapters_distinct: PASS — each chapter has unique visual signature, dominant hue, scene type
validation_summary.restoration_states_distinct: PASS — 3 states per chapter with clearly different saturation/brightness profiles
validation_summary.lighthouse_night_rule: PASS — all 6 chapters define night lighthouse visibility level with Ch1→Ch6 increasing prominence
validation_summary.seasonal_coverage: PASS — 18 backgrounds × 4 seasons × 3 time-of-day = 216 variant specs
validation_summary.winter_hotspring_elements: PASS — 4 required elements covered: rooftop_snow, snow_particles, enhanced_steam_x2, lighthouse_halo

completion_notes: All specs written. environment-art-spec.json (this file) is the canonical environment art record. Background-manifest, prop-manifest, and seasonal specs are written and cross-referenced. HTML review generated. Image generation awaits approval gate.
